args: source /home/worker/projects/MB-migration/.env.local 2>/dev/null; export MYSQL_HOST="${LOCAL_MYSQL_HOST:-127.0.0.1}" MYSQL_PORT="${LOCAL_MYSQL_PORT:-3306}" MYSQL_USER="${LOCAL_MYSQL_USER:-root}" MYSQL_PASS="${LOCAL_MYSQL_PASS}" MYSQL_DB="${LOCAL_MYSQL_DB}"; exec npx -y mcp-server-mysql@latest

source /home/worker/projects/MB-migration/.env.prod.local 2>/dev/null; export MYSQL_HOST="$MB_DB_HOST" MYSQL_PORT="$MB_DB_PORT" MYSQL_USER="$MB_DB_USER" MYSQL_PASS="$MB_DB_PASSWORD" MYSQL_DB="$MB_DB_NAME"; exec npx -y mcp-server-mysql@latest
